full_text:
Yuan Min 袁敏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Min (袁敏)was born in Chen. Discussed matters with Xian and an expert with a sword, he was interested in hydrology. Yuan Min was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
